metadata.title: FlowDockr Scope

hero.title: Stop scope creep in client projects.

items.title: New requests mid-project
items.description: Separate in-scope and out-of-scope work with explicit approval steps.

items.title: Last-minute scope changes
items.description: Anchor timeline impact and change-fee logic before rework starts.

items.description: Get written sign-off before applying any extra work.
